title: Senior Financial Analyst - Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd - Growth Opportunity
company: Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Senior Financial Analyst in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Punjab National Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd!
